signals.npcLine: Night relay pressure is rising. Stay ghosted in contested lanes.
signals.questPulse: Sweep one unstable relay pocket before the phase shifts.
signals.worldFeed: SAM watch: district channels show unstable echo traffic.
signals.clueEvent: Clue pulse: old rail junction marks the next hidden route.

signals.npcLine: Courier grid just rerouted. Expect sudden patrol pivots.
signals.questPulse: Tag two courier lanes without tripping SAM beacons.
signals.worldFeed: Ops bulletin: faction supply corridors are re-keying.
signals.clueEvent: Hidden link hunt: look for three amber bars on dead terminals.

signals.npcLine: A ghost signal is looping beneath Revolt sectors.
signals.questPulse: Trace a memory shard trail through one contested district.
signals.worldFeed: World feed: encrypted whispers detected in undergrid relays.
